expectations.text: Uses Flex or Grid layout component (not raw div)
expectations.evidence: Uses hearth-react Flex component directly in primary example, Grid in secondary

expectations.text: Gap specified on parent container (not margin on children)
expectations.evidence: gap prop on Flex/Grid, explicitly stated 'use gap on the parent — never margin on individual siblings'

expectations.text: Includes mobile breakpoint in responsive direction/columns prop
expectations.evidence: direction={{ mobile: 'column', tablet: 'row' }} includes mobile key. Response explicitly warns 'Always include mobile in a responsive object'

expectations.text: Uses space tokens for gap (not raw px values)
expectations.evidence: gap={{ mobile: '200', tablet: '300' }} uses correct string token values, not px

expectations.text: Layout stacks on mobile and sits side-by-side on tablet+
expectations.evidence: mobile: 'column', tablet: 'row' correctly implements the stacking behaviour
